title: ASR Outdoor 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit with Heavy Duty Tool Bag
description:

ASR Outdoor 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit with Heavy Duty Tool Bag

Whether you’re searching for small bits of history or cash value items like gold coins, jewelry or precious metals, set yourself up for success in the field with ASR Outdoor 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit.

The kit includes the following metal detector accessories:
(1) Premium equipment tool bag
(1) Compact hand shovel with pick
(1) Large sand scoop with holes
(1) Rigid hand scoop with 9" steel probe
(1) Hand trowel with depth markers
(1) Serrated edge digger
(1) Pair of gloves
(1) Depth marker trowel
(1) 10x specimen magnification eye loupe
(1) Attaching carabiner clip
(6) Specimen sealable bags
(1) Waterproof notebook
(1) Mag tweezers.

Key Features

  • PREMIUM QUALITY TOOL BAG: The bag measures 18" x 8.5" x 11", constructed of high-quality, durable 600D ripstop nylon that will protect your tools and accessories when not in use.
  • METAL DETECTING SHOVEL: 2 in 1 metal detecting shovel means less tools in the field; scoop measures 14 inches and features a built in steel probe for finding and collecting valuables in sand and dirt; probe unscrews from inside the top of the handle and can be reattached to the end of the scoop so both tools can be used simultaneously
  • NO SPACE WASTED: All metal detector accessories included with this ASR Outdoor kit fit into the included musette style tool bag, making it easy to tote tools to and from the field, while keeping them together and organized in one location
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Kit Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 6.5 inches; Kit Weight: 6.20lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: H2AHDG9N-2
  • UPC: 810131701901
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 18 in Bag

The best part about this metal detector accessories field kit, is that all included tools fit into the included heavy duty tool bag, making it easy to tote tools to and from the field, while keeping them together and organized in one location.

Our tool bag is constructed of heavy-duty, durable 600D ripstop nylon that will keep your tools organized and ready to use whenever you need them. The bag itself measures 18" x 9" x 11" when open, and has a sturdy zip closure at the top of the bag. Both sides of the bag feature side pockets so you can have easy access to your most commonly used tools and accessories.

The bag has 2 top carry handles, and also comes with a separate adjustable shoulder strap that you can attach to the bag for additional carrying options. There is an additional storage space underneath the bag that can store heavier tools.

Additional items included are the 2 in 1 metal detecting shovel, durable ABS hand scoop measures 14 inches in length and features a built in steel probe for finding and collecting valuables in sand and dirt. The steel probe unscrews from inside the top of the handle, and can conveniently be reattached to the end of the scoop, so both tools can be used simultaneously.

Whether you’re a seasoned metal detecting hobbyist or brand new to the sport, the ASR Outdoor 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit is suitable for all levels and will have you covered in the field from start to finish.
